title: zanthoxylum nadeaudii
intro: Zanthoxylum nadeaudii, also known as the Tahitian pepper or Tahitian prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Society Islands of French Polynesia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum nadeaudii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum nadeaudii include infusions, tinctures, and powders, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
